arts.ttl: Two-week window revealed for Moise Kean release clause
arts.sum: Moise Kean has a €50m release clause in his contract at Fiorentina, amid interest from Premier League clubs. Kean is a transfer target for several leading clubs after an excellent season with the Serie A side. The 25-year-old has scored 23 goals in all competitions for Fiorentina after signing from Juventus in the summer. Kean […] The post Two-week window revealed for Moise Kean release clause first appeared on The Football Faithful.
